title: Adidas India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Adidas India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!
